violations.description: General equipment and utensils - Maintenance and operation. — --Food contact equipment/utensil was not maintained in good repair or sound condition. - Cutting board on prep cooler has deep cuts, discolored.--Nonfood contact equipment/utensil was not maintained in a good repair or sound condition. - Reach- in freezer on cook line is rusty, not cleanable - Reach-in freezer by back door needs thawed.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)* were not maintained in good repair. - Wall by 3 comp sink needs repair, holes in sheet rock.
General employee cleanliness. — --Food employee did not wash hands as necessary. - Employee did not wash hands prior to gloving.

Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution (at proper concentration) between uses. - Saniti bucket found at 500ppm QT

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. - Prep food storage needs to be cleaned regularly.--Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. - Equipment, reach-in coolers, reach-in freezers, Cart, shelves all in need of deep cleaning.--Ventilation hood system was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required.

Manual cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Three compartment sink was not operated in the approved three step method. - Staff not using 3 step method all the time. Wash, rinse, sanitize all the time every time.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not maintained in good repair. - Wall by 3 comp sink needs repair, discolored, and small holes in wall.
Control of insects, rodents, and other pests. — --- Fly strips found through the facility, Staff removed during inspection.
